name: personalingo-skill
description: AI-powered personalized IELTS corpus generator and learning assistant. Generates tailored speaking corpus via Three-Stage Distillation (Research → Framework → Generation) and exports portable Skill Packs for AI agent integration.
author: orzcls

distill.description: Generate diagnostic questionnaire from free-form text

conversation.description: Send message, get AI coach reply

topics.description: Current season, staleness flag, config status
Run full topic bank sync pipeline
Backfill linked P3 for existing P2 topics

pipeline.name: three_stage_distill

stages.name: research
stages.description: Deep research — aggregate questionnaire, materials, conversations into learner_profile

stages.name: framework
stages.description: Capability framework — ability × scenario × goal matrix distillation

stages.name: persona
stages.description: User persona — MBTI dimension analysis + communication style

pipeline.fallback: Stage 1/2 failures auto-degrade to legacy 5-step flow (backward compatible)

requirements.optional: Search provider key for topic bank sync
